title: Choose the next transition after repository initialization

state.summary: Repository has a specification, examples, validation, and automated feedback
known_facts: canonical TIP and IFP examples exist
constraints: the protocol interfaces are still draft
the repository should stay small and inspectable

tension.summary: The foundation is ready, but the next transition must preserve a clear boundary between initialization and transition reasoning.

cause.summary: A verified initialization state can now be used as the starting state for transition reasoning.

transition.to: protocol family with an explicit verified handoff
transition.trigger: availability of a ready IFP record
transition.expected_consequence: TIP states can preserve the source of their initialization context

cooperation.shared_upside: The starting state of a TIP decision remains traceable to verified initialization evidence.

action.summary: Validate one explicit IFP-to-TIP handoff before expanding the protocol family.
action.review_after: handoff validator and negative tests pass
